title: crotalaria recta
intro: Crotalaria recta, also known as the upright rattlebox, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its seeds and leaves containing compounds that exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria recta include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to lower blood sugar levels and prevent scurvy. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria recta often involve the extraction of its seeds and leaves to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
